purpose: no-restack sync and targeted restack of studio-ui-token-oklch onto the merged environment/Foundry main checkpoint
identity: sole mutator Codex; source e455f7a427; restacked 4204e82b0b01 on main 2eea5f7dedec; stable patch-id 6b760fe972253620176d3a8f3d1f480a414a1eec; Graphite parent main
expectedTerminalState: released after stable patch-id, parentage, protected-head, readiness-ancestry, and clean-worktree checks
preservationReason: updated only the already-main-parented token branch; studio_runner_parked remains fully ancestral to main and no readiness head became ancestral
retentionTrigger: restacked clean local commit; external gate and PR update remain separately leased
operationNotes: The first no-restack sync was mistakenly invoked from the token checkout and synchronized the unsubmitted branch from remote; gt undo restored e455f7a427. The sync was rerun from a sibling worktree, which skipped the checked-out token branch and advanced main. Targeted restack preserved the patch-id. Graphite left the checkout with the inverse worktree delta despite the correct restacked commit; because the worktree was clean before restack and the reviewed patch was committed, git restore --source=HEAD --worktree restored the exact committed tree. Final status is clean.
